title: BrokenKodiak's Med Items
description: A Forge mod that adds medical items to the game.
body:
BrokenKodiak's Med Items is a Minecraft Forge Mod made by me BrokenKodiak using the MCreator mod maker.

The mod adds three new items: the Bandage, the MedKit, and the Adrenaline Shot.

Each of these three items give different potion effects when used. The effects are listed below.


The Bandage: Regeneration 2 for 4 seconds.

The MedKit: Regeneration 5 for 5 seconds.

The Adrenaline Shot: Strength 3, Speed 1, and Resistance 3 for 30 seconds each.


All of these items are able to be crafted and the crafting recipes are in the gallery images.
